algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived medical-office visual sign proportion
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: medical office interior wayfinding sign design. The optimizer prioritizes patient and visitor readability while keeping the panel proportion compact.

scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Medical-office wayfinding design variant with public-corridor viewing distance and readability-priority objective weights.

query_preferences.meaning: prioritize patient and visitor readability over compact sign-panel proportion

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Medical-office wayfinding design variant with public-corridor viewing distance and readability-priority objective weights.
algorithm_input.nonlinear_or_auxiliary_note: Contains a helper expression such as max(), abs(), symbolic division, or a variable product.
